description: You are a psychometrician validating a verbal reasoning test for gender bias. Perform a Differential Item Functioning (DIF) analysis using the Mantel-Haenszel method on the 'verbal' dataset from the 'difR' package. Use 'Gender' as the group indicator, designating '1' (Female) as the focal group and '0' (Male) as the reference group. The analysis must include item purification and use a significance level of alpha = 0.05. Export the list of items flagged with significant DIF to /home/ga/RProjects/output/dif_flagged_items.csv, save a diagnostic plot of the analysis to /home/ga/RProjects/output/dif_plot.png, and save the complete R script to /home/ga/RProjects/dif_analysis.R.
